# zenfra_vcs_repository (Data Source)

Reads a single Zenfra VCS repository by ID or by integration_id + full_name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zenfra_vcs_repository" "tf_base" {
  integration_id = data.zenfra_vcs_integration.github.id
  full_name      = "ndemeshchenko/tf-base"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `full_name` (String) The full repository name (e.g. `owner/repo`). Used together with `integration_id` for name-based lookup.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VCS repository. Either `id` or `integration_id` + `full_name` must be specified.
- `integration_id` (String) The VCS integration ID to search within. Required when looking up by `full_name`.

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the repository is archived.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the repository was created.
- `default_branch` (String) The default branch of the repository.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the repository is enabled in Zenfra.
- `provider_type` (String) The VCS provider type (github or gitlab).
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the repository was last updated.
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the repository (e.g. public, private).
- `web_url` (String) The web URL of the repository.
